summary: Deliverable is incomplete and cannot be shipped. Critical missing files: tests/cleanup.bats (workflow line 44 fails immediately), fixtures/sample.tsv, fixtures/args.txt. Task requires test harness that runs act, captures to act-result.txt, and validates exact output — not provided. Workflow runs bats directly instead of wrapping in required act test loop. No evidence of actionlint validation or TDD (failing test first). The cleanup.sh script itself is reasonable (set -euo, error handling, proper policies), but missing tests and test harness make it unmaintainable and unverifiable.
